accel.label: Acceleration
accel.description: Adjusts the expansion speed curve. Positive values make the ring expand slowly then accelerate; negative values make it start fast then decelerate.

blendEdges.label: Blend Edges
blendEdges.description: When enabled, the ring edges fade out smoothly based on distance from the ring center, creating a soft glow instead of hard edges.

centerX.label: Center X
centerX.description: Horizontal center of the shockwave ring as a percentage of the buffer width.

centerY.label: Center Y
centerY.description: Vertical center of the shockwave ring as a percentage of the buffer height.

cycles.label: Cycles
cycles.description: Number of times the shockwave ring expands from Radius1 to Radius2 over the effect duration.

endRadius.label: Radius2
endRadius.description: Ending radius of the expanding ring at the end of each cycle.

endWidth.label: Width2
endWidth.description: Thickness of the ring band at the end of each cycle.

scale.label: Scale to Buffer
scale.description: When enabled, radius and width values are treated as percentages of the buffer size. When disabled, values are in absolute pixels.

startRadius.label: Radius1
startRadius.description: Starting radius of the expanding ring at the beginning of each cycle.

startWidth.label: Width1
startWidth.description: Thickness of the ring band at the start of each cycle.

registryDefinition.notes: Spatial expansion effect. Best on matrix/radial/tree classes, but worth early inclusion because center/radius/width semantics are highly interpretable.
